titles.title: HLAfreq: Download and combine HLA allele frequency data

citation.article_title: The clinical significance of human leukocyte antigen (HLA) allele compatibility in patients receiving a marrow transplant from serologically HLA-a, HLA-b, and HLA-DR matched unrelated donors
citation.author: Morishima
citation.journal_title: Blood, The Journal of the American Society of Hematology
citation.unstructured_citation: Morishima, Y., Sasazuki, T., Inoko, H., Juji, T., Akaza, T., Yamamoto, K., Ishikawa, Y., Kato, S., Sao, H., Sakamaki, H., & others. (2002). The clinical significance of human leukocyte antigen (HLA) allele compatibility in patients receiving a marrow transplant from serologically HLA-a, HLA-b, and HLA-DR matched unrelated donors. Blood, The Journal of the American Society of Hematology, 99(11), 4200–4206. https://doi.org/10.1182/blood.V99.11.4200
